evidence.snippet:
### Aerospace
Reaching for the stars: Evonik solutions for aerospace applications

items.notes: Evonik serves Composites and Aerospace markets and sells High Performance Polymers (PEEK, polyamide) and composites materials that go into aerospace structural parts. The fetched corpus mostly covers Active Oxygens (hydrogen peroxide chemistry); the Aerospace & Defense page and High Performance Polymers product pages were skipped due to budget.

products_categories.notes: The 39 fetched pages are predominantly from the Active Oxygens business line. Evonik's broader portfolio includes High Performance Polymers (PEEK, polyamide) and composites materials that could qualify as UXV structural materials, but those pages were not fetched.

headquarters.notes: No explicit headquarters statement in corpus. Essen Campus and Essen - Goldschmidtstraße listed as key German locations in the site nav.

evidence.snippet: **With more than 100 years of experience in peroxides chemistry, Evonik is a leading supplier of peroxide-based products such as hydrogen peroxide, calcium peroxide, peracetic acid, and persulfates across a variety of applications. We offer a wide range of peroxide solutions for various industries.**

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Evonik is a large German specialty chemicals conglomerate serving 28+ markets including Aerospace, Composites, Electronics, and Pharma. No UXV-specific product line visible in the corpus.

items.name: PROPULSE®

evidence.snippet: Evonik has a long track history in the production of HTP grades specifically designed for aeronautic applications. These products are marketed under the trademark PROPULSE® and supplied to customers globally. PROPULSE® grades are available in different concentrations ranging from 82.5 % and up to 98 % hydrogen peroxide. All our grades have a purity of 99.99 %.

*   Operation of turbo pumps
*   Propellant for launch vehicles

items.notes: Aerospace-grade hydrogen peroxide (82.5–98%) for turbo pumps and launch vehicle propulsion.

items.name: HYPROX®

evidence.snippet: HYPROX® 700 RoW is an environmental friendly powerful oxidizing and bleaching agent, which is developed for general industrial use.

items.notes: Multiple grades (700 RoW, 300) for general industrial use.

items.name: PERSYNT®

evidence.snippet: PERSYNT® 350 LC is a specialty hydrogen peroxide grade. It is an aqueous solution of high quality, highly purified hydrogen peroxide and characterized by low organic impurities content.

items.notes: Multiple specialty grades for food, chemical synthesis, and cosmetic applications.

evidence.snippet:
--------------------
*   Ingredient in etchant formulations for fabrication of printed circuit boards

items.name: PERMEOX® Ultra

evidence.snippet: We supply food-grade calcium peroxide as a texturing agent for baked goods and as a tooth whitener for oral care. For soil and groundwater remediation, PERMEOX® Ultra is the product of choice for enhanced aerobic bioremediation of petroleum hydrocarbons and some non-halogenated organic substances due to its prolonged oxygen release.

items.notes: Enhanced aerobic bioremediation of petroleum hydrocarbons.

items.name: DEGAPAS®

evidence.snippet: Our dispersions — water soluble polyacrylic acid products marketed under the brand name DEGAPAS® — are sustainable antiscalants that interrupt organic crystal growth in water-bearing systems, heat exchangers, or boiler plants. This leads to better heat transfer, and thus energy cost savings.

items.notes: Water-soluble polyacrylic acid antiscalants for water-bearing systems.

products.notes: All products listed are from the Active Oxygens business line. Evonik has many other business lines with additional products not in the fetched corpus.

evidence.snippet: Evonik has a long track record in the production of HTP grades specifically designed for aerospace applications. These powerful products are not only easy to handle and supplied to customers globally, but also environmentally friendly, making it a future-proof pioneer for green rocketry. Unlike other common fuels, they are not carcinogenic.

readiness.notes: Catalog SKUs sold globally with standard packaging and logistics.

unresolved_questions: Whether Evonik's High Performance Polymers (PEEK, polyamide) or Composites products target UXV/drone applications
Whether the Aerospace & Defense section addresses UAS/UAV supply chain specifically
Whether PROPULSE® HTP is sold for UAS propulsion vs. only conventional launch vehicles

High Performance Polymers business line page; PEEK and polyamide for aerospace/UAS structural applications would confirm structures_and_materials category
Dedicated Aerospace market page; would show whether UAS/drone is explicitly in scope and which products serve that market
